meta.title: Tevi Troy on the United States' Bioterrorism Preparedness
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow Tevi Troy, speaking at the opening of the opening of Novartis' influenza vaccine plant, discusses the United States' ability to defend against a bio-terror attack.
